tips.title: 🌽 Maize Crop Rotation
tips.description: Rotate maize with legumes like beans or cowpeas to fix nitrogen in the soil naturally. This practice reduces fertilizer costs by up to 30% and breaks pest cycles.

tips.title: 💧 Smart Water Conservation
tips.description: Use drip irrigation or mulching with dry grass/crop residue to retain soil moisture. Farmers using this technique save up to 60% of water compared to traditional methods.

tips.title: 🐛 Organic Pest Control - Fall Armyworm
tips.description: Mix neem oil (5ml) with liquid soap (2ml) in 1 liter of water. Spray early morning or late evening. Repeat every 5 days for effective control without chemicals.

tips.title: 📈 Best Time to Sell Maize
tips.description: Storage is key! Sell maize between January and March when prices are highest (KSh 4,500-5,000 per 90kg bag) rather than during harvest (KSh 2,500-3,000).

tips.title: 🥔 Irish Potato Disease Prevention
tips.description: Use certified seeds and practice 4-year crop rotation. Never plant potatoes in the same field more than once every 4 years to prevent late blight buildup.
